questions.text: Have you ever felt something warm rising inside you, like Leo?
questions.pipPrompt: Invite the child to share without fixing.

questions.text: Where in your body do big feelings sometimes show up?
What helps you when feelings bubble up?

pocket.reflection: Sometimes feelings arrive like a warm volcano — and that's okay. You can notice them, breathe, and know they will settle.
pocket.pipLine: Pip keeps interesting things safe in the pocket.
